no-restricted-syntax.message: Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): member-call write-capable fs calls (fs.writeFileSync(...)) are banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts) and the export-IO module (src/store/exportIO.ts). Nothing may ever write under ~/.claude/projects/. If you genuinely need to write Claude's settings.json, do it there behind the path-asserting chokepoint; otherwise this is a read-only surface.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): the VSCode FileSystem mutators vscode.workspace.fs.writeFile/delete/createDirectory/copy/rename are banned outside the sanctioned export-IO module (src/store/exportIO.ts), which runtime-asserts the target is not under ~/.claude/projects/. The node-fs verbs delete/createDirectory/copy are NOT in the object-agnostic selector above because they collide with Map/Set.delete and array copies; this selector gates them to the vscode.workspace.fs callee chain so the deletion/dir-create primitive is caught the same way writeFile is. Nothing may ever write, delete, or create under ~/.claude/projects/.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): computed-access write-capable fs calls (fs['writeFileSync'](...)) are banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). Nothing may ever write under ~/.claude/projects/.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): a computed member call with a NON-LITERAL key (obj[m](...), where m is a variable) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). The fs-object-name gate is deliberately dropped: a namespace import aliased to any other name (const zz = fs as unknown as ...; zz[m](...)) defeats a name-gated rule, so ALL computed member calls with a variable key are blocked in src (a variable key cannot be statically proven read-only). Use an explicit named call inside the chokepoint instead.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): aliasing the whole fs module from require (const myfs = require('fs')) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). An arbitrarily-named module alias defeats the fs-object-name gate on computed write calls (myfs[m](...)); the only sanctioned whole-module reference is a namespace import (import * as fs from 'fs'), whose writes are member/computed calls already covered. Read fs only through a namespace import.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): aliasing the whole fs module from require (myfs = require('fs')) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). An arbitrarily-named module alias defeats the fs-object-name gate on computed write calls (myfs[m](...)); read fs only through a namespace import.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): aliasing a write-capable fs member off a require result (const w = require('fs').writeFile) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). This is the require-result twin of the const w = fs.writeFileSync alias; the bound name then carries a bare write that the identifier backstop may not name.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): destructured/named import of a write-capable fs member (import { writeFileSync } from 'fs') is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). This is the entry point for a bare or aliased write; import write-capable fs members only in the chokepoint.
Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): aliasing a write-capable fs member (const w = fs.writeFileSync) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts).

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): destructuring a write-capable member out of an fs.promises MemberExpression (const { writeFile } = fs.promises) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). This is the async entry point for a bare write; import write-capable fs members only in the chokepoint.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): destructuring a write-capable fs member out of require('fs') or require('fs/promises'), sync or async, is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts).

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): bare write-capable fs call from a destructured/aliased import (writeFileSync(...) or async writeFile(...)/appendFile(...)/copyFile(...)) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). Nothing may ever write under ~/.claude/projects/.
